message:
feat(cli): wire RaptorQ block-level recovery into btrfs fsck --repair path

Implement btrfs block-level corruption recovery using fountain codes:

- Extend BtrfsRepairGroupSpec with source_block_count and
  RepairGroupLayout metadata for RaptorQ symbol mapping
- Add discover_btrfs_repair_group_specs and recover_btrfs_corrupt_blocks
  integration into the fsck --repair workflow
- Wire group_btrfs_corrupt_blocks orchestration for batched recovery
- Add post-write re-scrub verification after block-symbol recovery to
  confirm repairs succeeded
- Validate in-scope mirror superblocks independently (not
  scrub-dependent) with repair from primary and re-verify
- Update context messaging ("fsck repairs" vs "fsck superblock repairs")
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] for the repair orchestrator
- Fix closure reference issue in repair callbacks

Enables automatic filesystem corruption recovery via fountain codes,
reducing dependency on manual fsck + rw-mount repair cycles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
